response.justification: Candidate has long tenure and broad full-stack experience across web, embedded, and GIS domains, with some exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling. However, the resume shows no evidence of director-level IC scope, no recognized AI products/platforms, no demonstrated cloud/AI strategy work with strategic customers, and no Master's/PhD or large-org entrepreneurial track record required for a Principal/Director-level AI strategy role. Timeline inconsistencies (overlapping roles, dates predating plausible career start) further reduce confidence.
strengths: Broad multi-stack engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure
Some exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic workflow frameworks
Track record of teaching, workshops, and open-source contributions (GISCollective, Trial, Fluent-Asserts)
concerns: No demonstrated AI products/platforms or recognized AI expertise at the level expected for the role
No evidence of director-level IC influence, strategic customer advisory, or shaping future cloud/AI product direction
Resume contains overlapping employment dates and implausible timeline (roles dating to 1992) that undermine credibility

key_factors.factor: No director-level IC or strategic advisory scope
